h1: Best Binary Search Questions for Microsoft
intro: A curated set of 6 Binary Search problems frequently useful for Microsoft interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Binary Search problems should I do for Microsoft?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 6 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Binary Search topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Binary Search Questions for Microsoft | AlgoForge
